hero-subtitle: SmartHarvest uses historical yield and climate patterns to help farmers make informed planting decisions for maximum productivity.
feature-0-desc: Optimize planting times for maximum yield
feature-2-desc: Track and analyze crop yields over time
mission-text: To empower farmers with data-driven insights and predictive analytics that optimize crop yields, reduce risks, and promote sustainable agricultural practices.
about-p1: SmartHarvest is a dedicated web-based Decision Support System (DSS) designed to empower farmers across the municipalities of Benguet. Our core mission is to promote sustainable farming methods and drastically improve farm decision-making in the face of persistent economic challenges.
about-p2: We achieve this by utilizing gathered historical data on local crop yields and climate patterns. Through rigorous analysis, SmartHarvest identifies crucial correlations and trends between historical weather events and farm outcomes.
about-p3: This process allows us to generate data-driven recommendations, providing farmers with a comprehensive report on the optimal planting times to maximize yield, guidance for better resource utilization, and actionable insights to reduce climate risks to their livelihoods and the regional economy. We're here to turn data into smarter harvests.
value-0-text: Make informed choices based on historical yield data and climate analysis
value-1-text: Tailored insights for Benguet municipalities and Highland crops
value-2-text: Stay updated with current weather and market information
weather-desc: Real-time weather monitoring for informed agricultural decisions
weather-info: Weather data updates every 5 seconds. Our system integrates real-time weather information with historical patterns to provide accurate planting recommendations.
team-desc: Our multidisciplinary team brings together expertise in agronomy, climate science, data analytics, and agricultural engineering.
login-subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
email-phone-help: You can use your email or phone number to sign in
register-intro: Join our farming community and get access to data-driven insights.
password-note: You'll set your password after verifying your email address.
email-verification-desc: We'll send a verification link to your email
sms-verification-desc: We'll send an OTP code to your mobile number

about.title: About SmartHarvest
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.paragraph1: SmartHarvest is a dedicated web-based Decision Support System (DSS) designed to empower farmers across the municipalities of Benguet. Our core mission is to promote sustainable farming methods and drastically improve farm decision-making in the face of persistent economic challenges.
about.paragraph2: We achieve this by utilizing gathered historical data on local crop yields and climate patterns. Through rigorous analysis, SmartHarvest identifies crucial correlations and trends between historical weather events and farm outcomes.
about.paragraph3: This process allows us to generate data-driven recommendations, providing farmers with a comprehensive report on the optimal planting times to maximize yield, guidance for better resource utilization, and actionable insights to reduce climate risks to their livelihoods and the regional economy. We're here to turn data into smarter harvests.
